prompt: scan ashby companies for remote software developer positions that yoad could apply to - he's a fresh CS grad looking to work remotely from israel

assertions.text: At least 3 Ashby API endpoints are fetched (api.ashbyhq.com/posting-api/job-board/...)
Results are filtered for remote positions (mentions isRemote, workplaceType, or Remote filtering)
Senior/staff/principal/director roles are excluded or noted as excluded
Results include company name, job title, and apply URL for each listing
A summary total is provided (X jobs found across Y companies)
